name: Barbecued Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the garlic as directed for Roasted Garlic.
2. Place the whole heads of garlic on a sheet of heavy-duty foil.
3. Spread 4 tablespoons of butter over each head of garlic.
4. Add a few sprigs of fresh rosemary (or oregano if preferred).
5. If fresh herbs are not available, substitute with dried herbs (2 teaspoons dried herbs per 8 heads of garlic).
6. Fold the foil over the garlic to seal it securely.
7. Place the foil package on hot coals and cook for about 45 minutes.
8. Turn the package occasionally using tongs to ensure even cooking.
